solutions.solution: Hence, if I also does not follow. Since, III - No descent → Some descent is a valid inference. Some bags are not students). Hence, I follows.
Some birds are stones → on conversion → Some stones are birds (this is a valid conversion). Some birds are grapes → on conversion → Some grapes are birds (valid). Hence, II follows.

Some desks are tables → All tables are recreants → I + A → I Some desks are recreants. Hence, II follows. Also, All tables are recreants; Some tables are desks → A + I → A, All desks are recreants. Hence, I follows. III will form a complementary pair, one of them has to be true. (See Concepts and Nuggets). Hence, either III or IV follows.

Some jackets are roses → on conversion → Some roses are jackets. Now, Some roses are sweaters → All sweaters → J + I → O → Some roses are not sweaters. Hence, II follows. Also, III and IV form a complementary pair; one of them will always be true. Hence, either III or IV follows.
All brunettes are cute → on conversion → Some cute are brunettes. Now, Some cute are brunettes + All brunettes are beautiful → I + A → I Some cute are beautiful. Hence, I follows.

Some chocolates are boxes → on conversion → Some boxes are chocolates. Now, Some chocolates are boxes → on conversion → No box is a desk → I + E → O → Some tablets are not boxes. Hence, II follows. Again, No box is desk → on conversion → No desk is a box. Now, Some tablets are desks → Nodesh is box → I + E → O → Some tablets are not boxes. Hence, IV follows.

Hence, Some drums are gaskets follows. This gives, on conversion, gaskets are drums. Also, Some gaskets are baskets → no valid conclusion can be drawn by combining all options. All baskets are gaskets.
E + A → O Hence, Some fish are not papers follows. Further I and II + E → O pair. They are complementary and either of them must be true.

The sentence is not aligned because the common term 'ducks' is at the end in both the statements. To align them, we convert the second statement to 'Some ducks are trucks'. Hence, III follows. Now, I + I → No conclusion. Other conclusions don't follow.
